ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal Notice – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello Alex,

We hope you are enjoying the full suite of features provided by our SaaS platform. This is a friendly reminder that your current subscription plan (Premium – 12‑month) is set to expire on May 30, 2026. To continue uninterrupted access, please review the renewal details and confirm your payment information.

Plan: Premium – 12‑month
Price: $1,200 per year (discounted 10% for annual commitment)
Renewal Date: May 30, 2026

To renew, simply click the button below and follow the secure checkout process:
<URL>

If you have any questions or would like to upgrade to a higher tier, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support team at support@example.com.

Thank you for choosing our services. We look forward to serving you for another year.

Best regards,

SaaS Support Team

---
© 2026 Example Corp. All rights reserved. | Unsubscribe

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Zoom Meeting Confirmation
spam.body:
Dear Alex,

This is a notification from the Executive Office regarding a critical meeting scheduled for tomorrow, May 20, 2026, at 09:30 AM EST. Please confirm your attendance by clicking the link below. Failure to attend will be recorded as a missed obligation.

Meeting ID: 123-456-7890
Password: Qwerty123

Join Zoom Meeting:
<URL>

If the above link does not work, please contact the IT Helpdesk immediately. Your prompt response is essential to ensure the meeting proceeds without delay.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,

Jordan M. Lee
Chief Operations Officer
Example Corp.
